text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Okay, here's mine... Your turn, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm going to... Oh, I know! Okay,<n>I'll go with
this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear lively voices coming from one<n>of the
classrooms as I'm walking<n>through the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You sound like you're having fun. Are<n>you
playing a game?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We're drawing pictures of<n>things that start
with the letters of the<n>alphabet, like this...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. So that's "ramen," right? Well<n>it's a nice
picture, but I already did<n>one for "R"! Remember
my rabbit?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, whoops! Well, I guess I'm out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Fine sure loves ramen.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
She really does! Between that and<n>her being
super friendly, it really<n>makes you forget she's
from an<n>aristocratic family.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You think so? But isn't everyone<n>enchanted by a
good bowl of ramen?<n>All those noodles tangled
up in the<n>shop's special broth, and—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Is there anything besides<n>ramen that
you're really into?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Um, let's see... Yeah, actually! I've<n>been getting
into photography lately!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's so fun to whip your phone out, gotap tap ☆ and just casuallycapture a nice little memory. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Casually? Was it difficult to take<n>pictures back
home?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, as a matter of fact, it was. But<n>back then,
the way we did things felt<n>totally normal to me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for keeping you all waiting.<n>I've come
in my Tracen Academy<n>uniform, so shall we take
some<n>commemorative photos?

text_block_list.name: Head Maid
text_block_list.text:
This way, Your Highness. We'll take<n>the pictures
just as soon as we've<n>applied your makeup.
Lights! Camera!<n>Security!

text_block_list.name: Attendant
text_block_list.text: Yes, right here! The reflector is in<n>position!

text_block_list.name: Security
text_block_list.text:
Eagle Squad! Assume photography<n>positions and
provide security from<n>above!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We need to get some with me in my<n>tracksuit as
well. I'd like everybody to<n>get a glimpse of the
sort of culture I'll<n>be experiencing.

text_block_list.name: Head Maid
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'll fetch the shoes we made to<n>fit Your
Highness's feet.

text_block_list.name: Security
text_block_list.text:
Hound Squad, do you copy? Assume<n>diamond
formation with Her Highness<n>at the center! Run
alongside the<n>camera crew!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the inconvenience.<n>Thank you
very much for your service.

text_block_list.name: Security
text_block_list.text: Our pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...You know, that kind of thing?<n>Everyone had to
work quite hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That was beyond anything I could<n>ever imagine...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and it's so fun being able to show<n>everyone
the pictures you've taken<n>right away. Actually,
just recently...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a sec. Fine! I'm looking at<n>your
Umastagram followers and... is<n>this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A flood of likes from celebrities I've<n>seen on TV...
on a picture of<n>veggie-loaded ramen...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding-dong, ding-dong ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's the school bell. Agh, I have<n>to clean the
blackboard!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...I feel like I've been treated to a<n>glimpse of a
completely different<n>world.
